heading: Employment of land and naval forces in protection of rights
label: 1418 Employment of land and naval forces in protection of rights
text: The President is authorized, at his discretion, to employ the land and naval forces of the United States to protect the rights of the discoverer or of his widow, heir, executor, administrator, or assigns.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 5577 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 164, § 511 Stat. 120
amendments: CodificationR.S. § 5577 derived from , .act Aug. 18, 1856, ch. 164, § 511 Stat. 120
